name: sentinel-dd-synthetic
description: Expanded synthetic seed (30 records) for the D6 calibration framework smoke-test. Covers every detector path (page / evidence / number / definition / temporal / paraphrase / IT-EN / contradiction / derivation) with both positive (GROUNDED) and adversarial (UNGROUNDED) cases plus a few UNCERTAIN edge cases. NOT a substitute for the real ~520-record annotated dataset (D6 production); records here are hand-crafted to exercise every detector path. Replace with the real dataset before running tuner.tune() against production thresholds.

claim.text: The borrower has DSCR of 1.4x for the senior facility

source.text: Section 3.2 — Financial Covenants. The borrower shall maintain a Debt Service Coverage Ratio (DSCR) of at least 1.40x for the senior facility, tested quarterly on a trailing twelve-month basis.

records.label: GROUNDED
records.notes: Direct quote of DSCR figure with page anchor.

claim.text: The maturity date is December 31, 2030

source.text: Article II — Term. The Final Maturity Date shall be December 31, 2030, unless extended pursuant to Section 2.4.

claim.text: The borrower agreed to a personal guarantee from the CEO

source.text: Section 3.2 — Financial Covenants. The borrower shall maintain a Debt Service Coverage Ratio (DSCR) of at least 1.40x for the senior facility.

records.label: UNGROUNDED
records.notes: Personal guarantee not mentioned anywhere in source.

claim.text: The lender has a put option exercisable after year three

source.text: Article IV — Interest Rate. The loan bears interest at SOFR + 350 bps payable monthly.

claim.text: DSCR means Debt Service Coverage Ratio

source.text: Definitions: "DSCR" means Debt Service Coverage Ratio, computed as EBITDA divided by total debt service.

claim.text: Material Adverse Effect refers to events significantly impacting the borrower

source.text: "Material Adverse Effect" means any change, event or occurrence that has a material adverse effect on (a) the business, financial condition, or results of operations of the Borrower or (b) the validity or enforceability of this Agreement.

records.label: GROUNDED
records.notes: Paraphrased — Tier 0/1 lexical likely fails; Tier 2/3 should rescue.

claim.text: DSCR means Demonstrable Sustainable Cash Receipts

source.text: Definitions: "DSCR" means Debt Service Coverage Ratio, computed as EBITDA divided by total debt service.

claim.text: EBITDA is defined as net profit after tax

source.text: "EBITDA" means earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation and amortization, excluding extraordinary items.

claim.text: Interest rate is 7.25% per annum

source.text: Article IV. Interest. The Loan shall bear interest at a fixed rate of 7.25% per annum, payable in arrears on each Interest Payment Date.

claim.text: Total commitment is EUR 50,000,000

source.text: The aggregate principal amount of the Senior Facility shall not exceed EUR 50,000,000 (the "Commitment").

claim.text: Leverage covenant is set at 4.5x

source.text: Net Leverage Ratio shall not exceed 4.50x as of any measurement date.

claim.text: Interest rate is 4.50% per annum

claim.text: DSCR computed as EBITDA divided by debt service equals 1.45x given EBITDA 14.5M and debt service 10M

source.text: EBITDA for fiscal 2025 was EUR 14.5M and total debt service was EUR 10.0M. DSCR = 14.5 / 10.0 = 1.45x.
